input: Tao noi dung TMĐT cho san pham: Tai nghe Bluetooth Sony WH-1000XM5. Thong tin: tai nghe chong on, Bluetooth, pin lau, phu hop hoc tap va lam viec.
output: {"standardizedProductName":"Tai nghe Bluetooth Sony WH-1000XM5","productSummary":"Sony WH-1000XM5 la mau tai nghe Bluetooth cao cap, noi bat voi kha nang chong on chu dong, chat am chi tiet va thoi luong pin phu hop cho hoc tap, lam viec va giai tri.","specifications":["Ket noi Bluetooth","Chong on chu dong","Thiet ke chup tai","Thoi luong pin dai"],"benefits":["Giam tieng on de tap trung hon","Am thanh ro rang khi nghe nhac va hop online","Deo thoai mai trong thoi gian dai"],"description":"Sony WH-1000XM5 mang den trai nghiem nghe nhac va lam viec tap trung hon nho kha nang chong on chu dong, ket noi khong day tien loi va thiet ke hien dai.","landingPage":{"heroTitle":"Tap trung tron ven trong tung am thanh","heroSubtitle":"Tai nghe Bluetooth cao cap cho hoc tap, lam viec va giai tri moi ngay.","cta":"Mua ngay","benefitSection":"Chong on tot, am thanh chi tiet, thiet ke thoai mai.","whyChooseSection":"Phu hop voi nguoi can mot chiec tai nghe chat luong cao de lam viec, hoc tap va di chuyen."},"slogan":"Am thanh dinh cao, tap trung moi luc.","socialContent":{"facebookPost":"Trai nghiem Sony WH-1000XM5 voi chong on chu dong, am thanh chi tiet va thiet ke sang trong.","tiktokCaption":"Tai nghe chong on cho ngay lam viec tap trung hon.","hashtags":["#SonyWH1000XM5","#TaiNgheBluetooth","#ChongOn"]},"seo":{"title":"Tai nghe Sony WH-1000XM5 chong on, Bluetooth cao cap","metaDescription":"Kham pha tai nghe Sony WH-1000XM5 voi chong on chu dong, ket noi Bluetooth va trai nghiem am thanh cao cap.","keywords":["Sony WH-1000XM5","tai nghe chong on","tai nghe Bluetooth"],"slug":"tai-nghe-sony-wh-1000xm5"},"faq":["Tai nghe co chong on khong? input: Tao noi dung TMĐT cho san pham: Laptop Dell Inspiron. Thong tin: laptop van phong, thiet ke gon, phu hop hoc tap, lam viec, gia tam trung.
output: {"standardizedProductName":"Laptop Dell Inspiron","productSummary":"Dell Inspiron la dong laptop phu hop cho hoc tap va cong viec van phong, noi bat voi thiet ke gon, hieu nang on dinh va muc gia de tiep can.","specifications":["Laptop van phong","Thiet ke gon nhe","Hieu nang on dinh","Phu hop hoc tap va lam viec"],"benefits":["Xu ly tot cong viec hang ngay","De mang theo khi di hoc hoac di lam","Gia phu hop voi nhieu doi tuong"],"description":"Laptop Dell Inspiron la lua chon phu hop cho nguoi can mot thiet bi on dinh de hoc tap, lam viec van phong, luot web va giai tri co ban.","landingPage":{"heroTitle":"Lam viec gon gang, hoc tap hieu qua","heroSubtitle":"Dell Inspiron dong hanh cung nhu cau hoc tap va cong viec moi ngay.","cta":"Xem san pham","benefitSection":"Hieu nang on dinh, thiet ke tien dung, muc gia hop ly.","whyChooseSection":"Phu hop voi sinh vien va nhan vien van phong can mot laptop ben bi, de su dung va de mang theo."},"slogan":"Gon nhe moi ngay, hieu qua moi viec.","socialContent":{"facebookPost":"Dell Inspiron la lua chon can bang cho hoc tap va lam viec voi thiet ke gon va hieu nang on dinh.","tiktokCaption":"Laptop van phong gon nhe cho hoc tap va lam viec.","hashtags":["#DellInspiron","#LaptopVanPhong","#LaptopHocTap"]},"seo":{"title":"Laptop Dell Inspiron cho hoc tap va van phong","metaDescription":"Dell Inspiron phu hop hoc tap, lam viec van phong voi thiet ke gon, hieu nang on dinh va gia tam trung.","keywords":["Laptop Dell Inspiron","laptop van phong","laptop hoc tap"],"slug":"laptop-dell-inspiron"},"faq":["Dell Inspiron phu hop voi ai?
